settings.heading: Since the pickups are for another day, here's the Lil Heat
settings.body:
The mini overdrive Greg voiced himself, built to nudge any amp into that sweet vintage breakup. Three knobs, true bypass, fits any board.

Toss it in with your order and call it a day. I can dig it.
settings.decline_label: No thanks, take me to my order
settings.testimonial_quote: That's a big sound for a Champ!
